creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: remko (src,doc committer)
Date: Thu Aug  1 18:43:48 2013
New Revision: 324117
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/324117

Log:
  Modify the latest puppet entry. Because the matching of the version everything
  below 3.2.2 was a match, including all 2.7.x versions. It also appears that
  there is no puppet27 version, just puppet-2.7.x and puppet-3.2.x instead.
  
  Bump modification date.
  
  PR:		180958
  Submitted by:	Kan Sasaki <sasaki@fcc.ad.jp>

Modified:
  head/security/vuxml/vuln.xml

Modified: head/security/vuxml/vuln.xml
==============================================================================
--- head/security/vuxml/vuln.xml	Thu Aug  1 18:02:04 2013	(r324116)
+++ head/security/vuxml/vuln.xml	Thu Aug  1 18:43:48 2013	(r324117)
@@ -1036,11 +1036,8 @@ Note:  Please add new entries to the beg
     <affects>
       <package>
 	<name>puppet</name>
-	<range><lt>3.2.2</lt></range>
-      </package>
-      <package>
-	<name>puppet27</name>
 	<range><ge>2.7</ge><lt>2.7.22</lt></range>
+	<range><ge>3.0</ge><lt>3.2.2</lt></range>
       </package>
     </affects>
     <description>
@@ -1063,6 +1060,7 @@ Note:  Please add new entries to the beg
     <dates>
       <discovery>2013-06-13</discovery>
       <entry>2013-06-22</entry>
+      <modified>2013-08-01</modified>
     </dates>
   </vuln>
